title: /pan
text: /pan Compile panels. /pan { /aft= DateTime } { /bef= DateTime } { Library } Switches /aft= or /bef= Parameters Library —name of the library containing the objects to compile; if omitted, all panels are compiled. Use wildcard characters to specify multiple libraries. Use With ide.exe —Uniface IDE Description The location of compiled panels is determined by the $RSO path. Related Links Compiling from the IDE Command Line The IDE command line can be used to compile multiple objects without opening the IDE. It is especially useful for automating compilation by means of batch scripts. Panels Panels are global objects that are typically used to create toolbars for form components and application shells. They contain buttons to execute structure editor functions and activate component operations. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
